summary: COMPREHENSIVE MOBILE AUDIT COMPLETE (V53.3). Tested 54 distinct routes on mobile viewport 390x844. ALL ROUTES PASS - no crashes, no error boundaries. Glass-card CSS removal verified - no blocking dark boxes found. Key interactive features tested: Teachings (teacher cards, teaching expansion, AI Contemplation button), Encyclopedia (tradition cards, concept expansion, Explore deeper), Video playback (YouTube iframe opens/closes), All 10 Mixer tabs work, Sage AI presets work, Login flow works, Account panel shows username. SceneEngine backgrounds visible on /oracle, /crystals, /herbology with full opacity.

issues: HTML element has rgb(0,0,0) background - this is expected body background, not a blocking dark box. Content is visible with SceneEngine backgrounds showing through.

SceneEngine.js correctly renders background images at full opacity with no overlay div
All inline dark backgrounds (rgba(15,17,28), etc.) have been replaced with transparent
Teachings.js, Encyclopedia.js, ExpandableInfoCard.js all have glass-card class removed from JSX

success_rate.frontend: 100% (54/54 routes pass, all interactive features work)

context_for_next_testing_agent: V53.3 comprehensive mobile audit complete. All 54+ routes tested on 390x844 viewport. No dark boxes blocking backgrounds. No blocking dark boxes found. Semi-transparent UI elements (rgba with alpha < 0.8) are intentional glass-style components. HTML body background is expected to be dark.

dark_box_analysis.analysis: All detected dark elements are either: (1) HTML body background rgb(0,0,0) which is expected, (2) Semi-transparent UI elements like rgba(10,10,20,0.4) which are intentional glass-style components, (3) Canvas elements for visualizations like star-chart. NO blocking opaque dark boxes found that would hide the SceneEngine background.
